description: Regression yardstick for §22b admin phases (23–28). UI-only scope — no server/auth/Supabase changes. Do not raise any counter without an accompanying REVAMP_PLAN.md entry explaining why.
notes: Phase 23 chrome consolidation should not raise admin/shared/*.js sink counts; prefer safe-dom helpers (el, clear).
Phase 24 dashboard rebuild must move admin/index.html inline <style> block into styles/admin.css.
Admin already carries X-Robots-Tag: noindex via _headers (phx/11) — preserve.
